specifications.title: Higher-privilege users can invite lower-privilege users
specifications.description: A user with a higher privilege level can invite an individual to create an account at a lower privilege level. When the invitation is successful, the system records the invitation details.

specifications.title: Higher-privilege users can delete lower-privilege accounts
specifications.description: A user with a higher privilege level can delete an account that has a lower privilege level. After deletion, the account is removed from the system.

specifications.title: Customers can raise complaints
specifications.description: Users with the role 'customer' are allowed to submit complaints. When a complaint is raised, the system records it and associates it with the customer.

specifications.title: Users must be signed in to perform protected actions
specifications.description: Users must be signed in before performing any protected system action, except sign-up and sign-in.

specifications.title: Sign-up requires email and phone number
specifications.description: During sign-up, a user must provide both an email address and a phone number. If these details are provided, a new user account is created.

specifications.title: Email and phone must be unique within the same role
specifications.description: For users with the same role, their email address and phone number must be unique. The system prevents sign-up if another user with the same role already uses the same email or phone.

specifications.title: Users can sign in with valid credentials
specifications.description: A user can sign in by providing valid credentials. If the credentials match an existing account, the system creates a session for that user.

specifications.title: Password reset feature
specifications.description: If a user forgets their password, they can request a password reset using their registered email. The system generates a reset token associated with that user.

specifications.title: Role must match during sign-in
specifications.description: When signing in, the role provided must match the role associated with the user’s account. If the credentials and role match, the system creates a session.
